// AUTO-GENERATED by kyo-ffi-codegen v1. DO NOT EDIT.
// Regenerate via `sbt compile` after modifying the binding trait.

package kyo.example

import scala.scalanative.unsafe.*
import scala.scalanative.libc.errno.errno
import scala.scalanative.reflect.annotation.EnableReflectiveInstantiation
import kyo.ffi.*
import kyo.ffi.internal.{AbiCheck, NativePtr, StructAbiCheck}

@EnableReflectiveInstantiation final class BlockingBindingsImpl extends BlockingBindings:
    import `BlockingBindings$externs` as ext

    def recv(fd: Int, buf: Buffer[Byte], len: Int)(using kyo.AllowUnsafe): kyo.Fiber.Unsafe[Ffi.Outcome[Long], Any] =
        kyo.ffi.internal.BlockingBridge.run {
            val bufPtr = kyo.ffi.internal.FfiUnsafe.expect[NativePtr](buf.raw.asInstanceOf[AnyRef], classOf[NativePtr], "NativePtr on Native", "kyo.example.BlockingBindings", "recv").ptr
            val retVal = ext.recv(fd, bufPtr, len)
            val __errno = errno
            val __kyoResult = retVal
            Ffi.Outcome.fromValueErrno(__kyoResult.toLong, __errno)
        }
end BlockingBindingsImpl

object BlockingBindingsImpl:
    import scala.scalanative.unsafe.*
    AbiCheck.verify(1, "kyo.example.BlockingBindings")
end BlockingBindingsImpl

@extern
@link("kyo_blocking")
private[example] object `BlockingBindings$externs`:
    @blocking def recv(fd: CInt, buf: Ptr[Byte], len: CInt): CLongLong = extern
end `BlockingBindings$externs`
